title: Syrian Lentil Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Syrian-inspired lentil pilaf, perfect for a comforting meal. Made with wholesome ingredients and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the rinsed lentils, pilaf rice, and tomato paste mixture. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils and rice are tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
